lines.text: Chandler and Joey's, there is lumber all over the apartment

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey-hey-hey. So what happened? A forest tick you off?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No. Y'know how we're always saying we need a place for the mail.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I started building one. But then I decided to take it to the next step.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You're building a post office?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, an entertainment unit, with a mail cubby built right in. It's a one day job, max.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. (notices that Joey is wearing some really tight jeans) My word! Those are snug.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah. These are my old work pants, Sergio Valente's.
Chandler goes to his bedroom and opens the door. However, only the top half opens, and he trips into his bedroom over the bottom half.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Power saw kinda got away from me there.
Opening Credits
Outside Central Perk, Phoebe is pacing back and forth waiting for someone.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (joining Phoebe outside) Hey Pheebs.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Any sign of your brother?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, but he's always late.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I thought you only met him once?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, I did. I think it sounds y'know big sistery, y'know, 'Frank's always late.'

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well relax, he'll be here.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, I know, I'm just nervous. Y'know it's just y'know Mom's dead, don't talk to my sister, Grandma's been sleeping a lot lately. It's like the last desperate chance to have a family, y'know, kinda thing. You're so sweet to wait with me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, actually Gunther sent me. You're not allowed to have cups out here, it's a thing. (takes her cup and goes back inside)
inside Central Perk

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Does anyone else think David Copperfield is cute?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, but he told me, he thinks your a fox.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, Janice, likes him. In fact she likes him so much she put him on her freebie list.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Her what?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, we have a deal, where we each get to pick five celebrities that we can sleep with, and the other one can't get mad.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ah, the heart of every healthy relationship. Honesty, respect, and sex with celebrities.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So, Chandler, who's on your list?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ah, Kim Basinger, Cindy Crawford, Halle Berry, Yasmine Bleeth, and ah, Jessica Rabbit.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Now, you do realize that she's a cartoon, and way out of your league?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know, I know, I just always wondered if I could get her eyes to pop out of her head.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, Monica, who would yours be?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: First, I need a boyfriend, then I can have a list.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It's just a game Mon. (makes a 'Can-you-believe-her' face to the rest of the gang.) Rach, how about you?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I don't know, I guess, Chris O'Donnel, John F. Kennedy, Jr., Daniel Day Lewis, Sting, and Parker Stevenson.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Spiderman?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hardy Boy.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Peter Parker.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What about you honey, who would be on your list?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well I-I-I, that kind of thing requires some serious thought. First, I'll divide my perspective canidates into catergories....

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (coughing) What a geek!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering) Everbody this is Frank! This is my half-brother Frank.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Oh, hi.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: This is everybody. This is Ross.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: How are you?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Chandler.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey-hey!

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: This is Monica.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Whoa!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And this is Rachel.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Whoa!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm gonna get coffee.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Hey, how do you guys get anything done?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We don't, really.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, so, now, do you guys have a lot of big plans?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh yeah! Yeah, no, we're gonna connect, y'know bond, and everything.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Yeah, I was thinking that maybe we could go down to Time Square and pick up some ninja stars. And, oh, um, my friend Larry, he wants me to take a picture of a hooker.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You know, we don't really take advantage of living in the city.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know.
Chandler and Joey's, Joey is drilling a hole in the wall and the drill comes out the other side really close to Chandler's head. Chandler then rushes out to talk to Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry. Did I get 'ya?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, you didn't get me!! It's an electric drill, you get me, you kill me!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Calm down, do you want this unit or not?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I do NOT want this unit!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, you should've told me that before, I'm not a mind reader. Hey, we're out of beer. I'm going to Monica's.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Fine! (goes into his room and slams the door, then he slams the bottom half of the door.)
Monica and Rachel's, Joey is entering

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! Where 'ya headin' in those pants? 1982?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh Monica, listen, I ah, I saw down at the hardware store, they got those designer tiles on sale. If you ever want to redo the bathroom floor.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why, what's wrong with my bathroom floor?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Nothing. It's just old and dingy, that's all.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I highly doubt that. (they both go to the bathroom)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah. If you ah, move your hamper, you see what color the tile used to be. (Monica gasps) Yeah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I can't live like this! What are we gonna do? What are we gonna do?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Relax. Here hold this (hands her his beer). This old stuff just comes right off. (he bends down to try and lift some tile right in the middle of the floor, in his tight pants.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's a little more than I wanted to see.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (manages to pry off only a small piece) Aw! Look at that, every inch of this stuff is glued down. It'd take forever to pry this up. You should ah, you should just leave it. (starts to walk away, but Monica grabs him)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I can't leave it! You gouged a hole in my dingy floor.
Joey places the toliet brush and holder over the hole, which is in the middle of the floor.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Eh! There you go.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You know that's nice, y'know we could put it back there after the surgeons remove it from your colon!
Phoebe's, Frank and her, are sitting on the counh, watching TV

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (sits up) Oh, ew!

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah I know what I wanted to ask you. Um, can you roll your tongue? Because I can, and my Mom couldn't, and I thought y'know, I figured that was something I got from our Dad.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: What, wait, you mean like this? (does it)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, yeah. You can do it to. (tries to do it, but can't)

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Your not doing it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh right, yeah okay, my Mom could, and I can't. We don't have that....

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: When's your birthday?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Feburary 16th.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: I know a guy who's the 18th.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wow, that's close. When's yours?

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: October 25th.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That's the same month as Halloween. So, um, what kinda things do you like to do at home?

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Melt stuff.
Central Perk, Ross is working on his list

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, I've got three of my five.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Three of your five, what?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Celebrities I'm allowed to sleep with.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! You are giving this a lot of thought.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, it's hard okay, I only have two spots left.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, so who do you got it narrowed down to?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, Elizabeth Hurely....

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oooh-hoo, very attractive, forgiving.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Susan Sarandon.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Eh, y'know what, she's to political, she probably wouldn't let you do it, unless you donated four cans of food first.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And!! Isabella Rosselini.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ooh-hoo. Very hot, very sexy. But ah, y'know she's too international, y'know she's never gonna be around.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So, you gotta play the odds, pick somebody who's gonna be in the country like all the time.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, 'cause that's why you won't get Isabella Rosselini, geography.
Phoebe's, Frank is melting a plastic spoon.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay so, by melting, you meant melting.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So is it like art?

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Yeah, you can melt art. Hey, can I use your phone?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Um, yeah sure. Why you wanna call your Mom?

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: No, I wanna melt it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, well um, not right now. Y'know I'm just gonna go to bed, I think the fumes are giving me a headache.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: (starts laughing) Yeah!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: G'night, bro.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: G'night.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Here. (gives him a fire extinguisher) Y'know, just in case.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Oh, excellent. (starts to melt the fire extinguisher's hose.)
Commercial Break
Monica and Rachel's, Phoebe is eating breakfast with Monica while Frank is playing with num-chucks on the balcony

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What kind of karate is that?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No kind. He just makes it up.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So how's it going with you guys?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So far, it kinda blows. I don't know, I just thought y'know that he'd feel more like a brother y'know, like you and Ross, just like close and connected and....

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh honey, we're close now but you-you wouldn't believe the years of-of nugies, and wedgies, and flying wedgies, and atomic wedgies, and....(Phoebe shakes her head like she doesn't understand) That's where the waistband actually goes over your head.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ah!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, we used to drive each other crazy playing the shadow game.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, how do you play the shadow game?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, how do you play the shadow game?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I just asked you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I just asked you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't have time for this.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, that is what the game is.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Which you just gave up really quickly.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering) Have you seen Joey?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What's the matter?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, just this! (turns around and has a paint lid stuck to the back of his pants.) Y'know what it's my fault really, because the couch is usually where we keep the varnish.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (yelling from bathroom) Hey, does somebody wanna hand me one of those tiles.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What's going on?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: He's retiling my floor. (they both run to the bathroom)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yo!! Spackel boy! Get up!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ah-ah-ah, now you started this, you will finish it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: He started mine first!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Build the unit Cinderelly, lay the tile Cinderelly.
Phoebe's, Phoebe and Frank are watching TV.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Whoa! Big octopus.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah. (phone rings and Phoebe answers it) 'Hello. (listens) Oh my God, I totally forgot! (listens) Well can't someone else do it. (listens) But, I have company. (listens) Yeah, no look, that's all right I'll come in.' (hangs up phone) Um, Frank, I'm really sorry but I have to go to work. It's-it's one of my regulars and he's insisting that I do 'um.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Hey, what kind of work do you do?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! I'm a masseuse. I give people massages and stuff.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: You-you work at one of those massage parlors?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, y'know we don't call it that, but yeah!

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: (starts laughing) Wow! That's wild! No, I had no idea.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All righty. I'll be back in-in a little bit. Unless you wanna come with me?

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: You mean like watch?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, no, you can get one yourself. It'll be on the house! Y'know what are big sisters for?

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Well, I don't think this, y'know.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, no, no, I wouldn't do you myself, I mean that would be weird. Yeah, no, I'll get one of the other girls to do it. Oh, this will be so much fun! Hey! Are you excited?

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Yeah! Hey, do Monica and Rachel work there?
Monica and Rachel's bathroom, Joey and Monica are admiring the new floor.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's beautiful! It's like the first bathroom floor there ever was. (Chandler tries to go to the bathroom) Whoa! Are you going in there for?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What, like a number?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi! Bye! (runs to the bathroom)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, I'm done with my choices, these are final. (holds up a little card)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, it's about time.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ooh, very official.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, yeah, well y'know Chandler printed it up on his computer.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And who laminated it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That would be me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right let me see. (grabs the card) Uma Thurman, Winona Ryder, Elizabeth Hurely, Michelle Pfieffer, and Dorothy Hammel?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, it's my list.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay honey, you do realize she only spins like that on ice.
Healing Hands Inc. (Phoebe's work), Frank is being ushered in, by the arm, to the room Phoebe is in by another girl.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Ow!-Ow!-Ow! Ow! Ow! Ow! Ow! Ow! Ow! Y'know, ow!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!-Hey! What's going on?

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: She broke my arm.

lines.speaker: Girl
lines.text: He touched my fanny.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: No, she touched mine first!

lines.speaker: Girl
lines.text: That's my job!

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: So wait, what's the deal here, I can have sex with you, but I can't touch you?

lines.speaker: Phoebe and Girl
lines.text: Ewww!!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You can't have sex with her!

lines.speaker: Girl
lines.text: What'd you think I was, a hooker?

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: No, your a masseuse, it's cool, I'm not a cop.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, Jasmine, can you, can you ask Mr. Whiffler if he can wait for like five minutes.

lines.speaker: Jasmine
lines.text: Fine. (starts to leave, and points at Frank) I don't like you!! (leaves)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (turns around and hits Frank) So that's what you thought I did!! God! That's not what I do!

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Wait that's-that's, what that's not what you do?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Nooo! Why would you think that?

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: I don't know, I mean, y'know, this is the city y'know, I just, I mean, I don't know.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Whatever, it's the perfect end to the perfect weekend anyways.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Oh, wait, no your right, no it was perfect and I can't believe that I screwed it up so bad.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You really thought it was perfect?

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Well, no, maybe-maybe it wasn't perfect, but y'know it was pretty cool, y'know, 'cause we had all those great talks y'know.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, um, which ones in particular were great for you?

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Well y'know about the tongue thing, y'know, and how I told you about my likes and my dislikes...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't....

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: How-how I like to melt stuff, and how I dislike stuff that doesn't melt.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Right, okay, um-mm.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Yeah, y'know I feel like I can really talk to you 'cause y'know you're my sister, y'know.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, I guess I do, yeah.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Then I go feel your friend up and make you mad at me.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, I-I wasn't hopping mad, y'know.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: You hopped a little bit. Yeah, I really sorry.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay. All right, this is my favourite part of the weekend, right now, this.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: This?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Oh come on we went, we went to Time Square, we found ninja stars, I almost got arm broken by a hooker...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: She wasn't a hooker.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Well, when I tell my friends about her she will be.
Chandler and Joey's, everyone is there, helping to lift the entertainment center into place

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, on three. One....Two....

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why don't we just go on two.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Why two?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Because it's faster.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I coulda counted to three like four times without all this 'two' talk.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, but in the future...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay!! Okay!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Come on!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Heavy thing, not getting lighter!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, one...two...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So we are going on two?

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: All right!! (they lift it into place, however there is one small problem, the unit is so long that it blocks some of both of their bedroom doors.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, good job Joe.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow, it's big!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah-yeah, so big that it actually makes our doors look smaller!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Maybe, my ruler's wrong.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Maybe all the rulers are wrong.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look it's not that bad. So what, it blocks a little of your door, a little of my door.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, y'know what I got a better idea. How-how 'bout it blocks none of mine door and a lot of yours? (throws his shoulder into the center to try and move it, but it doesn't move.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, listen, before I forget that side is still wet.
Central Perk, Rachel is serving some guy coffee.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay sir, um-mm, let see if I got this right. Ah, so this is a half-caf, double tall, easy hazel nut, non-fat, no foam, with whip, extra hot latte, right? (the guy nods) Okay, great. (she starts to walk away and under her breath) You freak.
Isabella Rosselini enters

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to Gunther) Thank you.

lines.speaker: Isabella
lines.text: (to Gunther) Um, coffee to go, please.
Ross recognises her and goes over to the couch, mouthing 'Oh my God'

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Isabella Rosselini. (points to her)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are you serious? (they all look) Oh my God.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Damn! I can't believe I took her off my list.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why? 'Cause otherwise you'd go for it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, maybe.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh-oh, you lie.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What you don't think I'd go up to her?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, it took you ten years to finally admit you liked me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, well missy, you better be glad that list is laminated.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You know what honey, you go ahead, we'll call her an alternate.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, hold my crawler.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rach, are you really gonna let him do this?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Honey, he's about to go hit on Isabella Rosselini. I'm just sorry we don't got popcorn.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to Isabella) Hi! Hi, I'm Ross, you don't know me, but I'm a big, big fan of yours. I mean, Blue Velvet, woo-oo hoo! Um, I was wondering if I could um, maybe buy you a cup of coffee? (Gunther hands her change) Or maybe reimburse you for that one?

lines.speaker: Isabella
lines.text: Aren't you with that girl over there? (points at Rachel, who waves back)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, yeah, kinda. Um, but that's okay, see we have an understanding, um, see we each have this list of five famous people, (gets his out) so I'm allowed to sleep with you. No, no, no, it's flattery.

lines.speaker: Isabella
lines.text: I'm sorry. (starts to leave)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh no, no, no, wait, wait, Isabella. Don't, don't just dismiss this so fast. I mean this is a once in a lifetime opportunity...

lines.speaker: Isabella
lines.text: Yeah, for you. Is that the list?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Um, yeah.

lines.speaker: Isabella
lines.text: May I see it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Um, no.

lines.speaker: Isabella
lines.text: Come on! (grabs the list)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: But, okay.

lines.speaker: Isabella
lines.text: (reading it) I'm not on the list!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Um, see, but that's not the final draft.

lines.speaker: Isabella
lines.text: It's laminated!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, um, okay see, you were, you were on the list but my friend, Chandler (Chandler waves) brought up the very good point that you are international, so I bumped you for Wynona Rider, local.

lines.speaker: Isabella
lines.text: Y'know it's ironic...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Isabella
lines.text: ...because I have a list of five goofy coffee house guys and yesterday I bumped you for that guy over there. (points at a guy and leaves)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to the rest of the gang) We're just gonna be friends.
Closing Credits
Chandler and Joey's, they are admiring the entertainment center

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know what?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Umm?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I bet 'ya ya I could fit in there. (points to a hole in the center)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I've got five bucks says you can't.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Get out your checkbook, mister.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, I think I have the cash.
Joey successfully enters the entertainment center, and Chandler closes the door on Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You are dogged man! I totally fit!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, you got me. (picks up a 2x4 and puts it through the handles so that the doors won't open) I'm out five big ones! (puts the money in the crack between the door and frame) Here you go.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thank you. Cha-ching! (Chandler starts to leave) Oh, well hello Mr. Lincoln. Better luck next time buddy. (Chandler leaves and closes the door) And the drinks are on me!
End
